title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies:
EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies!
